name: @mbeato/apimesh-mcp-server
description: MCP server for APIMesh — 67 x402-payable tools for AI agents (65 APIs + wallet usage + spend caps). Covers web vitals, security headers, SEO audits, email security and verification, tech-stack detection, brand assets, redirect chains, indexability, brand availability, HTTP status and method enumeration, favicon checks, microservice health, robots.txt and YAML parsing, JWT generation, regex building, OpenAPI doc generation, user-agent parsing, CSP and TLS hardening audits, subdomain vulnerability/exposure ranking, DNS propagation and IP infrastructure analysis, privacy policy scoring, port scanning, dependency license audits, API schema diffing, and more. Pay per call with USDC on Base via x402.
